title: Luffy Strikes the Noah
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Hody Jones, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is luffy strikes the noah.
scene: The scene focuses on luffy strikes the noah, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Hody Jones, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't stop moving, people!! Keep running!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They have no experience of humanity ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What is Prince Fukaboshi trying to say...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Run for it, people!! Can't you see?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Human beings are an inferior race.

summary: Luffy Strikes the Noah. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
